name: Cheddar Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cheese into 1/4 inch slices and place in a large bowl.
2. Let stand at room temperature for about 4 to 6 hours, or until very soft.
3. Beat until light colored and smooth.
4. Add garlic, Worcestershire sauce, salt, dry mustard, and hot sauce.
5. Gradually add beer, 1/4 cup at a time, blending well after each addition until light and fluffy.
6. Store in a tightly covered jar in the refrigerator.
7. Serve as a spread on crackers or as a topping for hot vegetables, baked potatoes, or hot homemade breads.
8. Will keep several months.
9. Makes 1 1/2 quarts of spread.
